title: Execute script to push updates to GitHub repository and log details.
job:
Run the following command in the VPS runtime shell:

```bash
cd /root/popebot_runtime/builder_brain_system_copy && /root/popebot_runtime/scripts/push_fallback_to_github.sh
```
After running this command, report the following:
1) `git remote -v`
2) `git log --oneline -n 1`
3) the last 20 lines of `/root/popebot_runtime/logs/github_backup.log`.
